overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic neon-lit city. The character traverses sidewalks, crosses streets at intersections, and moves through a dense urban environment with towering skyscrapers, digital billboards, and atmospheric haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit downtown sidewalk with commercial buildings

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past pedestrians and neon-lit buildings

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in blue jacket walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall building with red facade and vertical neon strip lighting
building with large illuminated HO sign on upper floors
red street sign with Broad text mounted on overhead gantry
large vertical digital advertisement screens on building facade
tall futuristic street lamps with multiple fixtures

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a neon-lit downtown sidewalk flanked by towering commercial buildings. The red neon building dominates the left side while the HO sign building stands on the right. Pedestrians walk in opposing directions and sparse traffic moves along the multi-lane street.

events.description: steps onto yellow crosswalk to cross the multi-lane street

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at the yellow crosswalk with other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: futuristic black car driving down the street parallel to the crosswalk

entered.detail: broad yellow striped pedestrian crossing lines on asphalt
massive vertical digital screen displaying advertisements on building

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the sidewalk onto a wide open intersection, crossing the yellow-striped crosswalk. The space opens up to full sky visibility with direct natural lighting. Other pedestrians cross in the same direction while a futuristic vehicle passes on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-lined avenue with distant city views

events.description: reaches opposite sidewalk and continues along tree-lined path

agents.ego_description: walking along the shaded sidewalk passing a parked car and approaching the distant skyline

entered.detail: row of mature trees with dense canopies lining the sidewalk
orange safety railing separating sidewalk from street level
dark colored futuristic sedan parked at the curb
cluster of towering glass and steel skyscrapers visible in the distance
large golden statue visible between buildings in the distance

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the street, the character walks along a tree-lined avenue with moderate vegetation providing partial shade. The sidewalk is bordered by an orange railing on the street side. In the distance, towering skyscrapers and a golden statue become visible through the haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection with plaza and towering skyscrapers

events.description: approaches large open intersection with view of towering skyscrapers and steam vents
emerges from building shadow into bright direct sunlight

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection with a group of pedestrians toward the towering city center

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians crossing together in the same direction

entered.detail: massive glass and steel skyscrapers dominating the skyline with reflective surfaces
building with white steam or smoke venting from the top
tall palm trees lining the right side of the intersection
zebra crossing lines on the wide intersection

segments.scene_description: The character enters a vast open intersection with full sky visibility and bright sunlight. Towering glass skyscrapers rise dramatically ahead with steam venting from one building. The character crosses with a group of pedestrians, passing palm trees on the right as the golden statue becomes more prominent in the center of view.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dense, neon-lit downtown corridor into a vast, sun-drenched urban plaza. It begins on a crowded sidewalk flanked by towering commercial buildings and glowing red neon signs, moving alongside pedestrians and sparse traffic. As the character steps off the curb, the scene opens up into a wide intersection with yellow-striped crosswalks and direct natural lighting, where futuristic vehicles pass by. The camera then follows the character onto a tree-lined avenue bordered by orange railings, where the atmosphere shifts toward a hazy vista featuring distant skyscrapers and a golden statue. Finally, the environment expands into a bright, open intersection filled with sunlight and venting steam, passing palm trees as the golden statue becomes the central focus against a backdrop of towering glass skyscrapers.
